description: Perform a multi-device vital signs cross-reference verification in OpenICE. Configure three simulated device adapters: a 'Pulse Oximeter', a 'Multiparameter Monitor', and a third device of your choice that shares at least one physiological parameter (such as Heart Rate, SpO2, or BP) with the others. Use the 'Vital Signs' clinical application to observe data and waveforms from these devices to inspect their numeric data. Create a verification report at /home/ga/Desktop/device_crossref_report.txt. The report must include a header with the Date, Technician Name ('QA Technician'), and Facility ('Regional Medical Center'), a list of the three device types created, a section identifying which parameters overlap between devices, an assessment of data consistency, and a final determination of 'PASS' or 'FAIL'.
